prerequisites.value: Wis 15, Combat Meditation, Meditation Master, character level 7th.

description.value: **Benefit:** Once per day, when you meditate as a full-round action using the Combat Meditation feat, you gain the effects of haste for 1 round per 2 character levels. These effects do not stack with the haste spell, the speed magic weapon special ability, or other effects granting the same result. This is an extraordinary ability.
